meaning: City 奎松城[菲律宾吕宋岛西南部城市]
examples: Let's go up north in Quezon City and experience another fabulous spa treat.
I'm here in Quezon City, Philippines and I'm lifting my prayer of petition to our God for your new born baby.
Tzu Chi volunteers in the Philippines bring aid to 200 families who were left homeless by a massive fire in Quezon City.
Four families live in the Quezon City compound -- and they share just one line.
"The access of the so-called peso-a-year advisers will be limited - this is good for the administration, " says Quezon congressman Danilo Suarez.
